{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
